name: Apparatus Focus Ring
pitch: Images arranged in a 2D elliptical path. The ring rotates via horizontal dragging, wheel, or arrow keys, bringing the active image to full scale, full opacity, and sharp focus at center stage.

lifecycle.idle: Slow, ambient micro-rotation of the ring (0.1rad/s) when inactive.
lifecycle.discovery: First drag or touch input activates coordinate tracking, shifting images off their base angles.
lifecycle.buildUp: Active drag, wheel scroll, or keyboard inputs spin the ring with momentum.
lifecycle.peak: Active item locks at front center stage with maximum scale, full opacity, and zero blur.
lifecycle.recovery: Friction slows rotation velocity down, settling and snapping the closest item into focus.
